description_long: This is a two-piece wooden storage unit consisting of a tall, vertical cabinet and a shorter, two-drawer chest. The cabinet features a smooth, light wood finish on the sides and a white front panel, giving it a modern, minimalist appearance. The chest has two horizontal drawers with subtle grooves for opening, and its front is also finished in white, contrasting with the natural wood top and sides. The back and sides of both pieces are plain, with no visible hardware or decorative elements. The drawers of the chest are partially open in one view, revealing a white interior. This set is suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways for organized storage.
description: A modern, two-piece wooden storage unit with a tall cabinet and a two-drawer chest, featuring light wood and white finishes. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and subtle drawer grooves.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profiles of both the tall cabinet and the chest, highlighting their depth.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full height of the cabinet and the two drawers of the chest, with visible wood grain and white panels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the thickness of the cabinet and chest, with less detail visible on the front.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain white back panels of both the cabinet and the chest, with the drawers of the chest partially open.
